title: Velenje, Velenje — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Velenje, Velenje: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Velenje is a city in Velenje with a population of 25,000. A modern planned city in the Šalek Valley, built after WWII for the mining industry, known for its socialist-era architecture, the Velenje Castle, and Lake Velenje.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
